children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: a Enforcement
children.text: This part shall be enforced by the Federal Trade Commission in the same manner, by the same means, and with the same jurisdiction as though all applicable terms of the Federal Trade Commission Act ( et seq.) were incorporated into and made a part of this part.15 U.S.C. 41

children.heading: Violation is treated as unfair or deceptive act or practice
children.label: b Violation is treated as unfair or deceptive act or practice
children.text: The violation of any provision of this part shall be treated as an unfair or deceptive act or practice proscribed under a rule issued under section 18(a)(1)(B) of the Federal Trade Commission Act ().15 U.S.C. 57a(a)(1)(B)
